intro: Executives from Anthropic, OpenAI, and Google plan to attend the G7 summit in France next week as world leaders discuss artificial intelligence policy. Google filed a lawsuit against a suspected Chinese cybercrime operation that allegedly used Gemini AI to send over 2 million fraudulent text messages to cellphone users. ChatGPT reached one billion monthly active users in May, though public sentiment toward AI has grown more cautious in recent weeks.

whitelist.title: Anthropic, OpenAI, Google Executives Plan to Attend G7 Summit
whitelist.desc: Artificial intelligence executives from Anthropic PBC, OpenAI and Alphabet Inc.’s Google are slated to attend the Group of Seven summit, a gathering of world leaders that gets underway next week in France.
